subject: The 'Mandatory Fun' Office Mixer

satirical_elements.exaggeration: The icebreaker activities lasted longer than the actual fiscal year.
satirical_elements.irony: The 'Employee Wellness' seminar caused three panic attacks and a stress-induced migraine.
satirical_elements.ridicule: A high-definition PowerPoint presentation on why pens are a luxury, not a right.
satirical_elements.folly: Management spent $5,000 on a 'synergy' consultant to tell them people like having weekends off.

social_critique: Prioritizing performative morale over actual livable wages.
